title: Blueprint Documentation - SRS + UML
round_1_rejected_findings: usecase_diagram.md used an invalid Mermaid flowchart direction 'graph LB'; Mermaid only accepts TB/TD/BT/LR/RL. Fixed to 'graph LR'.

Initial SRS NFR section did not explicitly fold in the four phase-mandated regulatory items (DPDP data-minimization + data-subject-rights, RPwD/APCA accessibility, CERT-In 6h, IT Act reasonable security). Added Section 3.2.1 regulatory mapping onto existing PRD NFR-007/011/014 with no invented requirement.

round_2_verification.srs_acceptance_criteria: 29 (one AC per FR; FR-002/005/008/009/025/027 aligned to PRD section 12 BDD)
round_2_verification.mermaid_validation: 13/13 parsed clean via mermaid v11 headless (mermaid.parse, FAILS=0) - GitHub-renderable
round_2_verification.drawio_full_vs_placeholder: 4 full mxGraph (class, component, sequence, deployment) + 9 valid placeholders referencing their Mermaid source
round_2_verification.entity_faithfulness: All diagram nodes reference only real HLD/openapi entities (Document/Section/Chunk, Router/Retrieve/Rerank/Generate nodes, FastAPI gateway, Qdrant/Postgres/Object storage, listed external providers, real /v1/* operations). No invented class or endpoint.
round_2_verification.hallucination_gate: PASS - no requirement, class, or endpoint introduced outside PRD/HLD/openapi scope
round_2_verification.context_faithfulness: PASS - every SRS requirement and diagram element traces to a cited source

needs_user_decision.item: Whether the 9 placeholder .drawio files should be promoted to full hand-laid-out mxGraph diagrams, or whether the canonical Mermaid (uml/*.md) plus full .drawio for the core 4 (class/component/sequence/deployment) is sufficient.
needs_user_decision.recommended_default: Keep current split (4 full + 9 Mermaid-referencing placeholders). The Mermaid files are the GitHub-renderable single source of truth per rule 45; full draw.io is only valuable for the structurally complex core diagrams. Promote individual placeholders on demand.
